stories.headline: Anonymous Scouts Drop Their NFL Draft Hot Takes
stories.editorial_direction: Draft week energy. Focus on the 'surprises' and anonymous scouting takes. Draft buzz with personality — which teams are overthinking, which prospects are rising/falling. Connect to the chaos of mock season.

stories.headline: NFL Replacement Refs Take Next Step Toward Fail Mary 2
stories.editorial_direction: CONTINUING STORY — yesterday covered hiring replacement refs, today's new development: background checks and physicals completed. Reference 2012 lockout and Fail Mary. Don't re-explain the setup.

tweets.text: Miami running back De'Von Achane, who was not present for the start of the team's voluntary off-season workout program last week, was spotted in the Dolphins' training facility today, per sources. It is believed that Achane showed up as a sign of good faith as the two sides continue discussing a contract extension, per source.

research_notes.continuing_context: CONTINUING STORY — yesterday covered replacement officials being hired. Today's new development: several completed background checks and will undergo physicals
new_developments: Background checks completed for 'several' replacement officials
timeline_pressure: NFLRA wants 10% annual raises plus $2.5M marketing fees
fail_mary_callbacks: Owners already passed rule changes to help from New York
escalation: Teams will be informed when replacement refs can work minicamps in June

stories.headline: Star NFL Reporter Resigns After Vrabel Photo Scandal
stories.editorial_direction: Factual only, no commentary. Report the resignation, the investigation, don't editorialize on the relationship. Stick to what happened professionally.

tweets.text:
Chargers general manager Joe Hortiz shut down trade rumors surrounding wide receiver Quentin Johnston, making it clear Thursday that the 2023 first-round pick isn't available.

Story via @krisrhim1:

https://www.espn.com/nfl/story/_/id/48505918/chargers-gm-joe-hortiz-shuts-quentin-johnston-trade-rumors

research_notes.timeline: Dianna Russini resigned from The Athletic after photos with Patriots coach Mike Vrabel at Arizona resort prompted investigation
research_notes.photos_context: Photos showed them at luxury hotel in Sedona - poolside, hot tub, with interlocked hands. Both married to other people
research_notes.athletic_response: Initially defended Russini, called photos 'misleading' and 'lacking context'. Later launched investigation as 'additional information emerged'
research_notes.resignation_details: Russini cited 'self-feeding speculation' and 'media frenzy' in resignation letter. Said she 'stands behind every story' published
research_notes.professional_impact: Nearly decade at ESPN before joining Athletic in 2023. Review of her work continues despite resignation

around_the_league.text: Penn St. RB Nick Singleton, who broke his 5th metatarsal in his right foot at the Senior Bowl, now has been medically cleared and has resumed running. Singleton projects to be a mid-round pick next week.

5 HR
9 RBI
2 BB (1 IBB)

The first player since 1990 to hit 5 home runs in a series against the Yankees.

Bam Adebayo on LaMelo Ball's apology: 

"All he kept saying was gang gang… I'm still waiting for the actual apology."

Cowboys restricted free agent kicker Brandon Aubrey has until Friday to sign an offer sheet with another team; if he doesn't, Dallas retains his rights for the 2026 season. With time running out and no offer forthcoming, Aubrey now looks destined to remain with Dallas in 2026.

This is huge for Oklahoma football and notable for the draft next week. 

Owen Heinecke is a projected Day 3 pick who now gets the chance to head back to school for another season.

One of the coldest parts of Steph's legacy is how his unprecedented dominance at 6'3" 38 years old is a result of an era he created 10 years ago.

It's his game, his rules, and he's the grandmaster of it.

The Chef From Akron 👨‍🍳🐐

1 goal
3 points
+2

Broke the Sharks record for points in a season. At 19 years old.
Drafting your best player's girlfriend #1 overall and expecting nobody to ask questions about their relationship is INSANE
People don't talk enough about the fact that Larry the Goldfish II went 49-34-2 for an entire NFL gambling season. Insane looking back at it.

tweets.text:
The skinny girl arm. What the fuck, Dan. 

I promise to get back in the lab and be better. I'm embarrassed but not deterred. I'm doing the Tim Tebow speech to myself right now
